summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all major flows: admin prompt, disk selection wizard, server CRUD, settings management, start/stop, themes (4), language switching (TR/EN), and reset setup.

issues: In container environment, most disks show as ineligible (8GB free vs 30GB required) - expected behavior but may confuse users. The /etc/hosts disk is auto-selected as the only eligible option.

critical_code_review_comments: I18nProvider.jsx line 189: ESLint warning about missing 't' dependency in useMemo - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality
Server start/stop is SIMULATED (status toggle in DB only) - real process spawn is in Electron for Windows build as documented
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state before each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_lgss_api.py cover all endpoints. Frontend uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. To test fresh, call POST /api/setup/reset first. Server start/stop is simulated (DB status toggle only).

backend: PUT /api/setup - updates setup state (admin_confirmed, disk, language, theme)
POST /api/setup/reset - clears setup and deletes all servers
POST /api/servers - creates Server1, Server2, etc. sequentially
frontend: Declined screen with retry button (data-testid: declined-screen, retry-admin-btn)
Disk selection wizard (data-testid: disk-wizard, disk-option-N, disk-wizard-confirm)
Sidebar with server tabs (data-testid: sidebar, add-server-profile-button, server-tab-{folder_name})
Server dashboard (data-testid: server-dashboard, server-title, server-start-button, server-stop-button)
Settings panels (data-testid: panel-administration, panel-world, panel-economy, etc.)
Theme picker (data-testid: theme-picker-btn, theme-option-{key}) - 4 themes verified
Language picker (data-testid: lang-picker-btn, lang-option-{code}) - TR/EN verified
